'''鈭歡-s-b''' ('''kagasab''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:cadenza|cadenza]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-s-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:cadenza|cadenza]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歡-s-b
|-
! Lemma
| kagasab
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thigasab|thigasab]] || [[word:jigasab|jigasab]] || [[word:shigasab|shigasab]] || [[word:kigasab|kigasab]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthugasab|thuthugasab]] || [[word:jujugasab|jujugasab]] || [[word:shushugasab|shushugasab]] || [[word:kukugasab|kukugasab]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thugasab|thugasab]] || [[word:jugasab|jugasab]] || [[word:shugasab|shugasab]] || [[word:kugasab|kugasab]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thugasab|thugasab]] || [[word:jugasab|jugasab]] || [[word:shugasab|shugasab]] || [[word:kugasab|kugasab]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thegasab|thegasab]] || [[word:jegasab|jegasab]] || [[word:shegasab|shegasab]] || [[word:kegasab|kegasab]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothogasab|thothogasab]] || [[word:jojogasab|jojogasab]] || [[word:shoshogasab|shoshogasab]] || [[word:kokogasab|kokogasab]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thogasab|thogasab]] || [[word:jogasab|jogasab]] || [[word:shogasab|shogasab]] || [[word:kogasab|kogasab]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thogasab|thogasab]] || [[word:jogasab|jogasab]] || [[word:shogasab|shogasab]] || [[word:kogasab|kogasab]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:gasab|gasab]] || [[word:gasab|gasab]] || [[word:gasab|gasab]] || [[word:gasab|gasab]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:gasab|gasab]] || [[word:gasab|gasab]] || [[word:gasab|gasab]] || [[word:gasab|gasab]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:gasab|gasab]] || [[word:gasab|gasab]] || [[word:gasab|gasab]] || [[word:gasab|gasab]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:gasab|gasab]] || [[word:gasab|gasab]] || [[word:gasab|gasab]] || [[word:gasab|gasab]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙gasab|th忙gasab]] || [[word:j忙gasab|j忙gasab]] || [[word:sh忙gasab|sh忙gasab]] || [[word:k忙gasab|k忙gasab]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathagasab|thathagasab]] || [[word:jajagasab|jajagasab]] || [[word:shashagasab|shashagasab]] || [[word:kakagasab|kakagasab]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thagasab|thagasab]] || [[word:jagasab|jagasab]] || [[word:shagasab|shagasab]] || [[word:kagasab|kagasab]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thagasab|thagasab]] || [[word:jagasab|jagasab]] || [[word:shagasab|shagasab]] || [[word:kagasab|kagasab]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shagasab|shagasab]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshagasab|goshagasab]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishagasab|gokishagasab]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shagasabn眉|shagasabn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshagasabnkn眉|goshagasabnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishagasabn眉|gokishagasabn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shagasabsh毛|shagasabsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshagasabnksh毛|goshagasabnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishagasabsh毛|gokishagasabsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shagasabro|shagasabro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshagasabnkro|goshagasabnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishagasabro|gokishagasabro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shagasabmu|shagasabmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshagasabnkmu|goshagasabnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishagasabmu|gokishagasabmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shagasabsher|shagasabsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshagasabnksher|goshagasabnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishagasabsher|gokishagasabsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shagasabng|shagasabng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshagasabnkng|goshagasabnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishagasabng|gokishagasabng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shagasabya|shagasabya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshagasabnkya|goshagasabnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishagasabya|gokishagasabya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shagasabyam|shagasabyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshagasabnkyam|goshagasabnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishagasabyam|gokishagasabyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shagasabn眉sh毛|shagasabn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshagasabnkn眉sh毛|goshagasabnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishagasabn眉sh毛|gokishagasabn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shagasabn眉ro|shagasabn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshagasabnkn眉ro|goshagasabnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishagasabn眉ro|gokishagasabn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shagasabn眉mu|shagasabn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshagasabnkn眉mu|goshagasabnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishagasabn眉mu|gokishagasabn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shagasabsh毛n眉|shagasabsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshagasabnksh毛n眉|goshagasabnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishagasabsh毛n眉|gokishagasabsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shagasabsh毛ro|shagasabsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshagasabnksh毛ro|goshagasabnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishagasabsh毛ro|gokishagasabsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shagasabsh毛mu|shagasabsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshagasabnksh毛mu|goshagasabnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishagasabsh毛mu|gokishagasabsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shagasabron眉|shagasabron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshagasabnkron眉|goshagasabnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishagasabron眉|gokishagasabron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shagasabrosh毛|shagasabrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshagasabnkrosh毛|goshagasabnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishagasabrosh毛|gokishagasabrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shagasabromu|shagasabromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshagasabnkromu|goshagasabnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishagasabromu|gokishagasabromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shagasabmun眉|shagasabmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshagasabnkmun眉|goshagasabnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishagasabmun眉|gokishagasabmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shagasabmush毛|shagasabmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshagasabnkmush毛|goshagasabnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishagasabmush毛|gokishagasabmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shagasabmuro|shagasabmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshagasabnkmuro|goshagasabnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishagasabmuro|gokishagasabmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|d414c41}}
